message:
fix(reactor): registration drop retry, formatting cleanup

registration.rs:
- Replace silent error swallowing in Registration::drop with a single retry on
  non-NotFound deregister errors. Transient failures (e.g. brief lock
  contention) now get one more attempt to clean up, reducing stale-registration
  risk without infinite retry loops
- Add test verifying the retry behavior via FlakyReactor mock

epoll.rs / lab.rs:
- Minor formatting: break long .insert() chain and wrap assert_with_log macro
  arguments for readability

tests/pool_warmup_wakeup.rs:
- Remove extra blank line after allow attribute

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
